commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes QQBot `/bot-group-allways` to read current runtime config for status and no-op decisions, updates command test runtime state, and adds a sequential on/off regression test.

PR surface: Source -4, Tests +28. Total +24 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not by executing tests in this read-only review. Current code uses a stale `ctx.accountConfig` snapshot, and the PR's new code path still has a clear `accounts.default` reproduction gap.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve the `accounts.default` compatibility path and extend the existing QQBot command regression coverage.

target.title: fix(qqbot): read group toggle state from current config
target.body:
## Summary

- Read `/bot-group-allways` status and no-op decisions from `runtime.config.current()` instead of the gateway account snapshot.
- Update the QQBot command test runtime helper so sequential config writes are visible to later command invocations.
- Add a regression test for `/bot-group-allways on` followed by `/bot-group-allways off` in the same running command context.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-oxlint-shards.mjs --threads=8`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/builtin/register-group-allways.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-command-handler.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-commands-impl.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `/bot-group-allways` could make status and no-op decisions from a stale `ctx.accountConfig` snapshot after the command had already written a newer `defaultRequireMention` value.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout with QQBot command runtime tests; no live QQBot gateway credentials were used.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/builtin/register-group-allways.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-command-handler.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-commands-impl.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix: The new regression test executes `/bot-group-allways on` and then `/bot-group-allways off` through the same `GatewayAccount` snapshot while `runtime.config.current()` reflects the first write.

Observed result after fix: The second command writes `defaultRequireMention: true` instead of returning the stale no-op response.

What was not tested: Live QQBot gateway interaction against Tencent QQ.
target.author: sliverp

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
